_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: Confocal microscopy (Z-stacks) of PDLIM2 (red) in Ben Men-1 cells and in primary meningioma cells
details: Successfully captured confocal microscopy images showing PDLIM2 localization in both cytoplasm and nucleus of Ben Men-1 and primary meningioma cells
